title: Workshop competitor research update
summary: A local competitor scan suggests the workshop market remains fragmented and that Messenger-based coordination is still common.
reportMarkdown:
## Workshop update

The market still appears fragmented. Evidence points to no obvious dominant local operating system for independent workshops.

claims.statement: The Philippine workshop software market has no clear dominant local platform.

assumptions.statement: Independent workshops are willing to adopt lightweight mobile-first workflow software.

risks.title: Messenger bypass risk
risks.description: Owners may continue using Messenger unless the product owns payments or repeat reminders.

openQuestions.question: How many workshops will pay monthly before payment automation is included?

suggestedScoreChanges.reason: Competitor scan did not identify a dominant local workflow platform.

reportUpdates.title: GarageBox competitive position
reportUpdates.content: GarageBox should be tracked as a local competitor, but current public evidence does not prove category dominance.
